mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.original_price AS originalPrice, p.condition_level AS conditionLevel, p.images AS imagesJson, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.meeting_point_text AS meetingPointText,
p.reject_reason AS rejectReason, c.name AS categoryName, ca.name AS campusName, mp.name AS meetingPointName, u.id AS sellerId,
u.nick_name AS publisherNickName,
u.avatar_url AS publisherAvatarUrl, u.score AS publisherScore,
u.auth_status AS publisherAuthStatus FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN campus ca ON p.campus_id = ca.id LEFT JOIN meeting_point mp ON p.meeting_point_id = mp.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{productId} AND p.is_deleted = 0

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.price,
p.original_price AS originalPrice, p.condition_level AS conditionLevel, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.images AS coverImage, c.name AS categoryName, ca.name AS campusName, u.id AS sellerId,
u.nick_name AS publisherNickName,
u.avatar_url AS publisherAvatarUrl,
u.auth_status AS publisherAuthStatus FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN campus ca ON p.campus_id = ca.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.status = #{status}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
